name: horizon
description: ./Horizon serv:run run Horizon server ./Horizon build:run guide you through Horizon set-up ./Horizon entities:make Fetch database for entities generation ./Horizon reset:run set back Horizon to default version ./Horizon log:clear empty the log.txt file ./Horizon controller:new [name]create a basic controller architecture ./Horizon form:create [name] create a basic form architecture ./Horizon migration:new create a basic migration architecture  ./Horizon migration:run Run the latest migration.
